name: fldigi-mcp
description: Control the fldigi amateur-radio digital-modem application from Claude.
long_description: Connects to fldigi's built-in XML-RPC interface and exposes the full API as a small set of logically-grouped tools. Read and control the modem, frequency, rig (CAT), logbook, and transmitter through plain language. Safe by default: the operator callsign is the single transmit gate, so with no callsign set the station is receive-only and nothing can key the radio. Includes an optional, experimental, region-aware Band Guidance feature that suggests calling frequencies and warns about out-of-segment operation (advisory only, never a hard lock).

tools.name: status
tools.description: Snapshot of version, mode, frequency, T/R, callsign, band.

tools.name: application
tools.description: fldigi program info and launch/stop the process.

tools.name: modem
tools.description: Operating mode (Op Mode) and modem settings.

tools.name: controls
tools.description: AFC, SQL, Rev, Lock, RxID, TxID, and status fields.

tools.name: transmit
tools.description: T/R, Tune, abort, macros, send text (callsign-gated).

tools.name: rig
tools.description: Rig (CAT) control: mode, frequency, bandwidth, notch, QSY.

tools.name: log
tools.description: Logbook / contest fields and ADIF records.

tools.name: fldigi_call
tools.description: Escape hatch: call any fldigi XML-RPC method by name.

callsign.title: Callsign
callsign.description: Your amateur radio callsign. Required to enable transmit; leave blank to keep the station receive-only. Any value is accepted (club, event, vanity, portable, international).

band_guidance.title: Band Guidance (experimental)
band_guidance.description: Suggest a mode's calling frequency and warn when a frequency is outside the digital band segment. Advisory only — never changes anything on its own.

region.title: IARU Region
region.description: Your IARU region for Band Guidance: 1 (Europe/Africa), 2 (Americas), 3 (Asia-Pacific).

fldigi_host.title: fldigi host
fldigi_host.description: Host where fldigi runs. Leave as 127.0.0.1 unless fldigi is on another computer.
